aboutHeroText: Since 2020, EE Commerce has been redefining online shopping in Egypt. We bring you millions of products at unbeatable prices, delivered to your doorstep.
aboutMissionText: To provide every Egyptian household with access to quality products at affordable prices, with a seamless shopping experience from browsing to delivery.
aboutVisionText: To become the most trusted and beloved e-commerce platform in the Middle East, empowering local businesses and delighting customers.
contactDescription: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contactSuccess: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

metaTitleHome: EE Commerce - Egypt's Online Shopping Destination
metaDescriptionHome: Shop millions of products at unbeatable prices on EE Commerce. Free delivery across Egypt on eligible orders.
metaDescriptionShop: Browse our catalog of products across all categories. Find the best deals on electronics, fashion, home goods and more.
metaDescriptionCart: Review your shopping cart before checkout.
metaDescriptionCheckout: Complete your purchase with secure payment options including cash on delivery and online payment.
metaDescriptionAbout: Learn about EE Commerce, Egypt's premier online shopping destination. Our mission, vision, and values.
metaDescriptionContact: Get in touch with EE Commerce customer support. We're here to help 24/7.
metaDescriptionSignIn: Sign in to your EE Commerce account to manage orders, track shipments, and more.
metaDescriptionSignUp: Create your EE Commerce account and enjoy a seamless shopping experience.
metaDescriptionProfile: Manage your profile, view order history, and update your preferences.
